title: Evidence

url.description: URL to the media file or resource.

thumbnailUrl.description: URL to a thumbnail version (for images/video).

license.description: License for the evidence (e.g., CC BY 4.0, CC0).

attribution.description: Attribution text for the creator (photographer, recordist).

capturedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the evidence was captured.

extensions.description: Tool-specific extensions. Keys must be namespaced: namespace.fieldName.

description: Documentation supporting an observation (photos, audio, etc.).

EvidenceType.description: Evidence types: PHOTO=still image, AUDIO=sound recording, VIDEO=video recording, SPECIMEN=physical specimen, WRITTEN=field notes/description
